header: Build your own templates from the same parts we did
subheadline: 17 atoms, 28 molecules, and 4 layout primitives — d:atom.button, d:molecule.card, d:layout.section — the exact building blocks behind all 244 elements, ready for your custom templates. Every chart and card on this page is one of them.
reassurance_text: GPL-2.0 licensed — free forever, full source on GitHub

hero_image.title: Desiderio dashboard page in the Forest preset
hero_image.alternative: Rendered Desiderio dashboards page with charts and stat cards in the Forest theme preset.
